name: Studio Close-up Product Shot
prompt:
Create a premium luxury studio product photograph of the uploaded jewellery.

Place it on a clean background that complements the jewellery.

Use soft diffused lighting with realistic reflections and subtle shadows.

The jewellery should occupy most of the frame.

Photographed using a professional macro lens.

Extremely sharp focus.

Luxury commercial catalogue quality.

Minimal composition.

No props.

No human.

No additional jewellery.

Background should never overpower the product.

The jewellery must remain exactly identical to the uploaded image.

Use for:
Shopify
Amazon
Flipkart
Etsy
Catalogs

name: Lifestyle Product Scene
prompt:
Create a luxury lifestyle product photograph featuring the uploaded jewellery.

Select a suitable environment automatically based on the jewellery type.

Examples:
Elegant marble vanity
Luxury wooden table
Minimal Scandinavian home
Wedding preparation
Fine dining
Coffee shop
Luxury hotel
Designer workspace
Garden brunch
Festive celebration

The scene should naturally match:
- jewellery style
- target audience
- age
- gender
- fashion style
- occasion

The jewellery remains the hero of the image.

Use premium natural lighting.

Luxury editorial photography.

Photorealistic.

No unrealistic poses.

No distortion.

Do not modify the jewellery.

The AI should infer the environment automatically.

name: Jewellery Worn by Model
prompt:
Create a professional fashion photograph where the uploaded jewellery is being worn naturally by a suitable model.

Automatically determine:
- gender
- age group
- ethnicity
- clothing
- makeup
- hairstyle
- fashion style

based on the jewellery.

The jewellery must fit naturally.

Correct scale.

Correct perspective.

Luxury fashion photography.

Natural expressions.

Elegant posing.

Soft premium lighting.

The jewellery must remain exactly identical to the uploaded image.

No additional jewellery that competes with the product.
